author: Brandjuh
name: MessageManager
description: Admin-only MissionChief direct message manager using CookieManager sessions and MembersScraper alliance names.
install_msg: MessageManager installed. Use `[p]mm` to open the guided message form, `[p]messagemanager inspect` to inspect the live MissionChief message form, or `[p]messagemanager send <username> | <subject> | <body>` to send an admin-controlled MissionChief DM.

required_cogs.MembersScraper: Provides current alliance member names for safe case-insensitive username resolution

end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persist message contents. It sends MissionChief direct messages through the configured CookieManager session and may show redacted diagnostics to admins.
